solar.title: Solar EPC Solutions
solar.desc: End-to-end solar engineering, procurement, and construction services designed for high performance, maximum yield, and 25+ years of operational durability.

details.title: Utility Scale Power Plants
details.desc: Large megawatt scale grid-connected ground mounted installations with automated smart tracking.

details.title: Commercial & Industrial Rooftops
details.desc: Cost-reduction plants for factories, commercial towers, warehouses, and institutions.

details.title: Residential Systems
details.desc: Grid-tied solar systems with premium net-metering and modern aesthetic integration.

details.title: Operation & Maintenance (O&M)
details.desc: Thermal drone inspections, automated waterless cleaning, and real-time remote monitoring.

ev.title: EV Charging Infrastructure
ev.desc: Empowering electric mobility with advanced charging systems, centralized fleet hubs, and certified safety-compliant installation networks.

details.title: Commercial Charging Stations
details.desc: Dual gun AC and DC fast chargers integrated with seamless digital payment interfaces.

details.title: Fleet Charging Solutions
details.desc: Dedicated high-current charging yards for electric logistics, buses, and corporate fleets.

details.title: High-Speed DC Fast Chargers
details.desc: CCS2, CHAdeMO, and GB/T standard ultra-fast chargers from 30kW up to 240kW.

details.title: CMS Management Software
details.desc: Cloud-based tracking for station availability, energy utilization, and bill generation.

ups.title: Industrial UPS & Power Backup
ups.desc: Complete uninterruptible power supply solutions built for critical operations, medical hubs, and advanced data center environments.

details.title: Industrial Grade UPS
details.desc: Heavy-duty modular online UPS with high power factor and input harmonic protection.

details.title: Commercial Grade Backup
details.desc: Reliable power security systems for high-rise offices, retail grids, and smart infrastructure.

details.title: Data Center Backup Systems
details.desc: N+1 and 2N redundant topologies ensuring 99.999% uptime with lithium-ion integration.

details.title: Battery Management Systems
details.desc: Smart battery banks containing active cell balancing and real-time degradation diagnostics.

stabilizer.title: Voltage Stabilizers (AVR)
stabilizer.desc: Advanced electronic voltage regulation to safeguard high-precision CNC machinery, industrial medical units, and sensitive electrical grids.

details.title: Servo Voltage Stabilizers
details.desc: Microprocessor-controlled copper-wound stabilizers with ultra-fast correction response.

details.title: Industrial Heavy AVR
details.desc: Wide input range stabilizers designed for unbalanced three-phase industrial inputs.

details.title: Spike & Surge Protection
details.desc: Class B & C lightning surge arresters and active filtering circuits to prevent transients.

details.title: Custom Enclosures
details.desc: IP54 outdoor-rated designs with automated air ducting or oil-cooled setups.

dg.title: Diesel Generator (DG) Solutions
dg.desc: Robust back-up power packages comprising generator supply, customized soundproof enclosures, and continuous AMCs.

details.title: Heavy Duty DG Sets
details.desc: Engine-driven generators starting from 5 kVA up to 3000 kVA configurations.

details.title: Acoustic Enclosures
details.desc: CPCB-IV emission and noise level compliant structural acoustic canopies.

details.title: AMF / Auto Transfer Panels
details.desc: Automated grid outage sensing with auto-start and load transfer within 8 seconds.

details.title: Annual Maintenance (AMC)
details.desc: Scheduled filtration cleaning, system inspections, and 24/7 technical callouts.

pmc.title: Project Management Consultancy
pmc.desc: Professional site supervision, budget optimizations, structural quality audits, and scheduling for infrastructure projects.

details.title: Strategic Planning & Scheduling
details.desc: Critical path analysis, Primavera schedules, and complete resource leveling checks.

details.title: On-site Construction Supervision
details.desc: Continuous surveillance, milestone checks, and strict HSE safety protocol compliance.

details.title: Quality Assurance Audits
details.desc: Detailed concrete testing, electrical insulation resistance tests, and hardware verification.

details.title: Cost & Billing Audits
details.desc: Contractor bill verification, change-order optimization, and budget tracking panels.

details.title: HT / LT Panel Boards

details.title: Cabling & Cable Trays

details.title: Power Quality Assessments
